name: Linda w. German Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 5 lbs red potatoes, cooked with skins on
recipeInstructions:
1. While potatoes are cooking, chop celery and set aside.
2. Chop onions and set aside.
3. Fry bacon, chop into small pieces, and set aside.
4. Remove bacon from fat, add chopped onions to the fat, and sauté.
5. Remove onions from the fat and discard the fat from the pan.
6. Return 1/3 cup of fat to the pan.
7. Add flour and brown slightly.
8. Add vinegar, water, salt, sugar, and pepper.
9. Cook until clear.
10. Peel potatoes and cut into slices while still hot. Add the remaining 2 teaspoons of salt to the hot peeled potatoes.
11. Combine onions, celery, bacon, and sauce with the potatoes.
12. Let stand for several hours to allow flavors to blend.
13. Decorate with bacon or parsley or whatever desired.
